chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for Someone Who Shortens a Circuit in the Hijr

text: 2807 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «مَنِ اِخْتَصَرَ فِي اَلْحِجْرِ اَلطَّوَافَ فَلْيُعِدْ طَوَافَهُ مِنَ اَلْحَجَرِ اَلْأَسْوَدِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2807 - In a narration from Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar, from Imam (as):
"Whoever shortens their tawaf by passing through the Hijr (Hijr Ismail) must repeat their tawaf starting from the Black Stone."
